candidate_summary: TCM pulse diagnosis (28-quality discrete taxonomy on single bodily interface) → discrete-taxonomy live probing of LLM residual stream for online operational diagnostics

Same mechanism (linear probe on residual stream + discrete taxonomy) with Bloom's instead of TCM pulse qualities. The COLING 2025 'LLMs meet Bloom's Taxonomy' paper reinforces. Forced hits are TCM-medical-AI source-domain papers (TCM pulse diagnosis with CNN/ANN for medical applications). Verdict FAIL: the discrete-taxonomy-on-single-probe architecture is published; the TCM-specific 28-quality vocabulary would be a taxonomy substitution rather than a new architecture.
